headline: Should You Buy, Sell, or Hold AAPL Stock Before Q2 Earnings?
summary: Apple expects 13%-16% sales growth in fiscal Q2 2026 and 48%-49% gross margin as iPhone and Services rise.

headline: Should You Buy, Sell or Hold Microsoft Stock Before Q3 Earnings?
summary: MSFT heads into fiscal Q3 earnings with strong AI momentum and cloud growth, but stretched valuation and margin pressure may keep new investors cautious.

headline: 3 Services Stocks We’re Skeptical Of
summary: Business services providers play a critical role for enterprises, assisting them with everything from new hardware integrations to consulting and marketing. Still, investors are uneasy as firms face challenges from AI-driven disruptors and tightening corporate budgets. These doubts have certainly contributed to the industry’s recent underperformance - over the past six months, services stocks were flat while the S&P 500 was up 3.4%.

headline: HP Inc.: Near 52-Week Low, 6% Yield, Valuation Attractive Amid Dynamic Memory Environment
summary: HP Inc.'s financials have deteriorated over five years, with revenue, EPS, and operating profits all declining significantly. Find out why HPQ stock is a Hold.
